modal.title: One-time authorization
modal.intro: LearnWiki wants to remember which app you copied something from, so your clipboard history can show the source app.

examples.wechat: Copy from WeChat → shows WeChat icon
examples.chrome: Copy from Chrome → shows Chrome icon
examples.notes: Copy from Notes → shows Notes icon

modal.note: After you click the button below, macOS will show a dialog. Please choose "Allow". LearnWiki only reads the name of the frontmost app — nothing else.

toast.granted: Authorized! Clipboard history will now show the source app.
toast.dismissed: Okay — you can turn this on from Settings anytime.

banner.title: Automation permission denied
banner.subtitle: Clipboard history can't show where content came from

settings.automationDesc: Identify which app you copied content from
